HANDS actions on receipt of batch_6_leads.json: (1) Replace each google_query with name-specific form: site:linkedin.com/in "[Owner Name]" "[Business Name]" using actual data from batch_6_leads.json. (2) Execute queries on Day 3 ONLY (Fri 2026-06-05 Scenario A or Fri 2026-06-12 Scenario B) — NOT before Day 3. (3) Write linkedin_profiles.json entry immediately after each search and connection attempt — one entry per lead, same session. DO NOT BATCH. Without it: Batch 6 repeats the 64-session failure. Archive trigger fires unconditionally Tue 2026-06-10 EOD (Scenario A) or Tue 2026-06-17 EOD (Scenario B).
minimum_viable_features: Drive Playwright: Google search → extract LinkedIn profile URL
Confirm profile is business owner (not employee)
Check posts tab (last 60 days) → flag if post found
Read note template from data/linkedin_connection_notes.json → personalise using profile data
Write data/linkedin_profiles.json entry IMMEDIATELY after each attempt — do NOT batch
Log errors + skip reasons — never crash silently
